ddls:
CREATE TABLE "disasters" (
  "disaster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disaster event */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the disaster occurred */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone where the disaster occurred */,
  "geographical_region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographical region where the disaster occurred */,
  "disaster_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of disaster */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the disaster occurred */,
  "village" TEXT /* Name of the village where the disaster occurred */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the disaster */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the disaster data */,
  "data_cards" INTEGER /* Number of data cards or reports related to the disaster */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths caused by the disaster */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* Number of people injured in the disaster */,
  "missing" INTEGER /* Number of people missing after the disaster */,
  "houses_destroyed" INTEGER /* Number of houses destroyed by the disaster */,
  "houses_damaged" INTEGER /* Number of houses damaged by the disaster */,
  "victims" INTEGER /* Number of victims of the disaster */,
  "affected" INTEGER /* Number of people affected by the disaster */,
  "relocated" INTEGER /* Number of people relocated due to the disaster */,
  "evacuated" INTEGER /* Number of people evacuated during the disaster */,
  "losses_usd" REAL /* Estimated losses in US dollars */,
  "losses_local" REAL /* Estimated losses in local currency */,
  "education_centers_damaged" INTEGER /* Number of education centers damaged by the disaster */,
  "hospitals_damaged" INTEGER /* Number of hospitals damaged by the disaster */,
  "crops_damaged_ha" REAL /* Area of crops damaged by the disaster in hectares */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the disaster record */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the disaster record */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the disaster record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the disaster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disaster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disasters_disaster_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("disaster_type_id") REFERENCES disaster_types ("disaster_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disasters_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disasters_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disasters_geographical_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("geographical_region_id") REFERENCES geographical_regions ("geographical_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disasters_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone where the district is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the district */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone */,
  "zone_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographical_regions" (
  "geographical_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical region */,
  "geographical_region_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographical region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the geographical region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geographical_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disaster_types" (
  "disaster_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disaster type */,
  "disaster_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the disaster type (e.g., FIRE, EPIDEMIC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disaster type */,
  "disaster_type_category" TEXT /* Category of the disaster type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disaster_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Western Region, Central Region) */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "villages" (
  "village_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each village */,
  "village_name" TEXT /* Name of the village */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the village is located */,
  "village_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the village */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("village_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_villages_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., responder, analyst, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "disaster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disaster being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the disaster data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the disaster data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the disaster data was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the disaster data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_disaster_id FOREIGN KEY ("disaster_id") REFERENCES disasters ("disaster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., personnel, equipment, supplies) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the resource */,
  "resource_category" TEXT /* Category of the resource */,
  "resource_status" TEXT /* Current status of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource allocation */,
  "disaster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disaster the resource is allocated to */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being allocated */,
  "quantity_allocated" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource allocated */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date of the resource allocation */,
  "allocation_status" TEXT /* Current status of the resource allocation */,
  "allocated_by" TEXT /* User who allocated the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_allocations_disaster_id FOREIGN KEY ("disaster_id") REFERENCES disasters ("disaster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_allocations_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response plan */,
  "disaster_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disaster type the plan is for */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the response plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the response plan */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the plan was created */,
  "plan_status" TEXT /* Current status of the response plan */,
  "plan_category" TEXT /* Category of the response plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_plans_disaster_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("disaster_type_id") REFERENCES disaster_types ("disaster_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_plan_steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each step in the response plan */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response plan the step belongs to */,
  "step_name" TEXT /* Name of the step */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the step */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the step in the response plan */,
  "step_status" TEXT /* Current status of the step */,
  "step_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_plan_steps_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES response_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "disaster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disaster the report is for */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Current status of the report */,
  "report_category" TEXT /* Category of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_disaster_id FOREIGN KEY ("disaster_id") REFERENCES disasters ("disaster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disaster_history" (
  "disaster_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "disaster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disaster record being changed */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Details of the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disaster_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disaster_history_disaster_id FOREIGN KEY ("disaster_id") REFERENCES disasters ("disaster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_requests" (
  "resource_request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource request */,
  "disaster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disaster the resource is requested for */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being requested */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Current status of the resource request */,
  "requested_by" TEXT /* User who requested the resource */,
  "requested_at" TEXT /* Date the resource was requested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_requests_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_requests_disaster_id FOREIGN KEY ("disaster_id") REFERENCES disasters ("disaster_id")
)
